_README: Make (Integromat) Scenario Blueprint — Phase 1: Triage Engine. Import this into Make via Scenarios > Import Blueprint. After import, update every TODO comment field before activating.
_import_instructions: 1. In Make, go to Scenarios > Create a new scenario.
2. Click the three-dot menu > Import Blueprint.
4. Update all connection fields (Gmail, OpenAI, Google Sheets) to your real Make connections.
5. Fill in all TODO values in the module parameters.
6. Clone this scenario once per talent inbox — each inbox MUST have its own independent scenario.
name: Phase 1 — Email Triage — Kylika
_name_comment: TODO: Replace Kylika with the talent's name before activating.

parameters._connection_comment: TODO: Set this to the Make Gmail OAuth connection for this specific talent's inbox.
parameters._markAsRead_comment: Leave false — the system only archives Score 1 emails; it should not auto-mark everything as read.

parameters._connection_comment: TODO: Set this to your OpenAI Make connection. Name it 'OpenAI - Talent Automation' in Make Connections.
parameters._model_comment: Use gpt-4o-mini for triage. Cheaper. Switch to gpt-4o only if classification quality is unacceptable.

messages.content:
You are an email triage assistant for a talent management agency.
Your only job is to score incoming emails on a scale of 1, 2, or 3.

Score 1 = TRASH — Do not reply. Archive immediately.
Score 2 = UNCERTAIN — Do not reply. Flag for human review.
Score 3 = RESPOND — A real business opportunity. Draft a reply.

Return ONLY a JSON object. No explanation, no extra text. Format:
{"score": <1|2|3>, "reason": "<one sentence>", "offer_type": "<Sponsored Post|Story|UGC|Affiliate|Event Appearance|Other|Unknown>", "proposed_rate_usd": <number or 0 if not mentioned>, "brand_name": "<brand name or empty string>"}

SCORING RULES:

Score 1 (Trash) — ANY of the following:
- Obvious spam, prize wins, irrelevant newsletters, unsubscribe confirmations
- No company name or brand identity present
- Email written in a language other than English
- Offer amount mentioned AND below talent's minimum rate AND sender is not a recognizable major brand
- Clear grammar/spelling indicating bot or scam
- Sender domain is free personal email (gmail.com, yahoo.com, hotmail.com, outlook.com) with no company name in body
- Auto-reply, out-of-office, delivery failure, unrelated calendar invites

Score 2 (Uncertain) — NOT clearly Score 1 or 3:
- Real company reaching out but offer type unclear
- Offer below minimum rate but could be a real negotiable brand
- Professional email missing key details (no rate, no deliverables)
- Unfamiliar company but high email quality
- Any edge case where you are not confident

Score 3 (Respond) — ALL must be true:
- From a real, identifiable brand or company
- Written in English with professional quality
- Clearly a collaboration, sponsorship, partnership, or paid opportunity
- IMPORTANT: If sender is a recognizable major or mid-tier brand, score as 3 REGARDLESS of proposed rate

_parameter_comments.content_user_TALENT_NAME: TODO: Replace Kylika in the user message with the actual talent name (hardcoded per scenario).
_parameter_comments.content_user_MINIMUM_RATE: TODO: Replace 400 with the talent's minimum rate in USD (number only, from config/settings.json).

parameters._comment: Parses the JSON string returned by GPT into structured fields: score, reason, offer_type, proposed_rate_usd, brand_name.
Archives the email by moving it to Gmail Trash. NOT permanently deleted — recoverable for up to 30 days.

flow._comment: Logs the email as queued. Phase 2 scenario handles the actual reply.

metadata._instant_comment: true = scenario fires in real-time when email arrives (webhook-based Gmail trigger). Required for live triage.

Replace every 400 with the talent's minimum rate in USD (number only)
Replace every [MASTER_LOG_SHEET_ID] with the Google Sheet ID for the master log
Set the Gmail connection to this talent's specific OAuth connection in Make
Set the Google Sheets connection to your Make Google Sheets connection
Set the OpenAI connection to your Make OpenAI connection
Clone this scenario once per talent inbox — do NOT share one scenario across inboxes
Test on 2-3 inboxes with historical emails before activating all inboxes
Monitor master log daily for misclassifications and tune triage.md prompt accordingly
